field.name: player_id
field.label: Player
field.description: Select a player to assign to the team roster
field.query: SELECT id AS value, CONCAT(last_name, ', ', first_name) AS text FROM #__ttclub_players WHERE published = 1 ORDER BY last_name ASC, first_name ASC

field.name: team_id
field.label: Team
field.query: SELECT t.id AS value, CONCAT(IF(s.label != '', CONCAT(s.label, ' '), ''), s.start_year, '/', LPAD(MOD(s.start_year + 1, 100), 2, '0'), ' - Team ', t.team_number) AS text FROM #__ttclub_teams t LEFT JOIN #__ttclub_seasons s ON s.id = t.season_id WHERE t.published = 1 ORDER BY s.start_year DESC, s.label ASC, t.team_number ASC

field.name: half_season_id
field.label: Half-Season
field.query: SELECT hs.id AS value, CONCAT(IF(s.label != '', CONCAT(s.label, ' '), ''), s.start_year, '/', LPAD(MOD(s.start_year + 1, 100), 2, '0'), ' - Half ', hs.half) AS text FROM #__ttclub_half_seasons hs LEFT JOIN #__ttclub_seasons s ON s.id = hs.season_id ORDER BY s.start_year DESC, s.label ASC, hs.half ASC
